report.summary: Cycle-close v12: 142 TS errors unchanged (same 5 files — lido-v3 94, structured-data 40, crypto-arbitrage 4, institutional-adoption 2, crypto-index 2). 531 published slugs (+2 from v11), 428 with page.tsx. 2 queue pages ready (socialfi-creator-tokens, crypto-options-strategies). 6/6 API routes healthy with correct TTLs. git index.lock persists — blocking commits. No new deploy since 21aaf5b. 10 modified + 17 untracked files pending.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 531 published slugs (+2 from last cycle), 428 with page.tsx — 103 legacy gaps unchanged
142 TypeScript errors across 5 files (no change from v11): lido-v3-stvaults (94), structured-data.examples (40), crypto-arbitrage (4), institutional-adoption (2), crypto-index-funds (2)
All errors are JSX escaping issues — unescaped '>' and '$' chars — mechanical fix only
4 new learn pages built this cycle: katana-perps-idex, tokenized-funds-institutional-defi, socialfi-creator-tokens, crypto-options-strategies — all have page.tsx
Today's batch 11-13 pages all verified present: grayscale-hype-etf, nasdaq-tokenized-equities, katana-perps, tokenized-funds, congressional-tokenization, bitgo-ipo
2 PUBLISH_QUEUE pages (socialfi-creator-tokens, crypto-options-strategies) built and ready to promote
Production site unreachable from sandbox (egress blocked) — cannot verify HTTP status codes
